title: Unify package documentation as PackageDocs

source.subject: pckg: unify docs as PackageDocs, remove markdown browser and dialog

body:
## Outcome

Unify docs as PackageDocs, remove markdown browser and dialog.

## Context

- Workstream **pckg-registry** — registry and PackageDocs UI.
- Contributes to deliverable **Registry dashboard and package docs foundation** (`v02-pckg-registry-foundation`).

## Provenance

- **Repository:** `pckg`
- **Commit:** [`71c5ec1`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/pckg/commit/71c5ec1) — pckg: unify docs as PackageDocs, remove markdown browser and dialog
